list.vod_content: A poor girl who was married to a wealthy nobleman. In contrast to her expectation of the wealthy, the girl soon discovers the demonic truth of the family, the secret to their wealth.

list.vod_blurb: гҖҖгҖҖCarla (25) is a lonely young woman who spends her life uploading videos to social media with the d
list.vod_content: гҖҖгҖҖCarla (25) is a lonely young woman who spends her life uploading videos to social media with the dream of becoming a famous influencer. When she discovers that a malevolent presence inhabits her home, Carla becomes obsessed with documenting the paranormal events, which generates the followers she always desired. However, as her fame increases, so does the evil force that seeks to destroy her.
